mapper.insert: insert into reports (target_type, target_id, member_id, reason_code, reason_detail) values ( #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{memberId}, #{reasonCode}, #{reasonDetail} )
mapper.update: update reports set delete_yn = 'Y' where report_id = #{reportId} and member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N' and status = 'PENDING'
mapper.select: select report_id, target_type, target_id, member_id, reason_code, reason_detail, status, created_at from reports where member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N' order by report_id desc limit #{start}, #{end}
select count(*) from reports where member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N'
select report_id, target_type, target_id, member_id, reason_code, reason_detail, status, created_at from reports where report_id = #{reportId} and member_id = #{memberId} and delete_yn = 'N'
